sourceAmbiguity: Duplicate or replayed grant use could open a second claim path.
decisionTaken: Map stale and duplicate redemption states to StaleGrantMappedOutcomeCard and the existing settled result destination.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: AccessGrantRedemptionRecord remains exact-once and supersession maps old links to current truth.
operationalRisk: Provider or browser replay behavior may vary by channel.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add channel-specific replay rows without permitting a second claim session.
